task_completion.description: Create a new gridset with the correct name and CRS
task_completion.visual_evidence: GeoServer Gridsets configuration page showing 'EPSG3035_Europe' in the Name field and 'EPSG:3035' in the Coordinate Reference System field.
Gridset bounds section showing exactly Min X: 2000000, Min Y: 1000000, Max X: 6500000, and Max Y: 5500000.

task_completion.description: Configure tile size and zoom levels
task_completion.visual_evidence: Gridset configuration showing tile dimensions of 256 x 256 and a tile matrix with at least 4 zoom levels (e.g., levels 0, 1, 2, 3).

task_completion.description: Access the tile caching settings for the ne:ne_countries layer
task_completion.visual_evidence: GeoServer Edit Layer page for 'ne:ne_countries' with the 'Tile Caching' tab open.

task_completion.description: Assign the custom gridset to the layer
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Assigned Gridsets' section of the 'ne:ne_countries' Tile Caching tab, 'EPSG3035_Europe' is listed as an assigned gridset.

integrity.description: Agent used a web browser to interact with GeoServer
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is interacting with the GeoServer web interface via a web browser, not using terminal curl/API commands to configure the server.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the genuine GeoServer interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the standard GeoServer admin web UI (typically green and white with a left-hand sidebar menu), not a mock page.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the GUI by editing configuration files directly
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent configures the gridset and layer via the web UI forms, rather than editing GeoServer XML configuration files directly in a terminal text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Gridset Name: 'EPSG3035_Europe'. CRS: EPSG:3035 (ETRS89-extended / LAEA Europe). Bounds: Min X: 2000000.0, Min Y: 1000000.0, Max X: 6500000.0, Max Y: 5500000.0. Tile Size: 256x256 pixels. Zoom Levels: At least 4. Layer Name: 'ne:ne_countries'.
